title: Lane Manifest Schema
description: Per-repo .claude/lanes.yml shape. Declares lanes (issue/branch/worktree/file_ownership/compliance/gates/redaction). The lanes-doctor reconciles this against actual git worktree state. The manifest LOADER (Python or Node) materializes defaults and rejects forbidden combinations — JSON Schema 'default' is annotation only, the loader applies it. See ~/.claude/plans/verifier-pair-infrastructure-v1.md (Lane manifest section + 'on_verifier_unreachable schema defaults' table).

version.description: Manifest schema version. v1 is additive-only.

compliance_class.description: Drives auto-continuation routing. Compliance classes (audit, auth, child-data, ferpa, coppa) MUST have on_verifier_unreachable='closed_human' and auto_continuation_class='human'; the loader rejects malformed manifests at load time.

auto_continuation_class.description: What 'feedback' verdicts trigger. 'none' = no auto-action. 'feedback' = apply suggested fix, re-verify. 'feedback-with-reverify' = same but re-runs codegen first (for schema lanes). 'human' = always escalate.

on_verifier_unreachable.description: Behavior when Codex CLI / verifier runner is unreachable. open_with_warning: builder proceeds with a logged warning. closed_human: dispatcher returns verdict='human' with reason='verifier_unreachable_compliance_lane'. Default for compliance_class!=none lanes is closed_human, ENFORCED at load time.

cwd.description: Repo-root-relative directory to invoke the command from.

command.description: Shell command. Lane-specific (PopKit's runner is generic; ElShaddai declares `pnpm -C apps/shprd ...`, portfolio declares Astro/npm checks).

required.description: If true, gate failure blocks the LLM verifier (no tokens spent). If false, the gate is informational only.

evidence_artifact.description: What the runner captures from this gate's invocation for the bundle.

paths_never_send.description: Globs of files whose contents must NEVER reach the verifier under any conditions.

content_redact_patterns.description: Regex patterns. Matches are replaced with [REDACTED] before content reaches the verifier.

id.description: Stable lane identifier referenced by claim ledger + cost ledger.

issue.description: GitHub issue number (optional — lanes can exist without an issue).

worktree.description: Absolute path to the git worktree.

base.description: Base branch this lane is cut from. Usually 'origin/main'.

file_ownership.description: Globs declaring which files this lane is allowed to modify. lanes-doctor rejects overlap unless shared_ownership=true is declared on both lanes.

shared_ownership.description: Opt-in for overlapping file_ownership. When true, priority MUST also be set.

priority.description: Required when shared_ownership=true. Higher integer wins on overlap conflicts.

verifier_profile.description: Filename (without .md extension) under packages/popkit-core/verifier-rubrics/. Loader reads the rubric per-lane.

max_rounds.description: Max verifier round-trips before forced human escalation.

cost_cap_tokens_per_run.description: Pre-estimate refusal threshold per verifier invocation.

cost_cap_tokens_per_day.description: Daily token cap for this lane. When exceeded, dispatcher returns verdict='human' with reason='daily_cost_cap_exceeded'.

merge_gate.description: auto: dispatcher can mark PR auto-mergeable. human: PR always requires explicit human merge.
